elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} You may put a card from your hand in Reserve.
#I can't be played# if there's another card in your hand.  #{J}# Create an [Aerolith] token in your Landmarks.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: #{D} : Create an [Aerolith] token in target player's Landmarks.#

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: You play Permanents for {1} less, down to a minimum of {1}.
[[Fleeting]].  Play me for {1} less if there are no other cards in your hand.  Send to Reserve target Character with Base Cost {3} or less.
{J} I gain 1 boost.  When another Character joins your Expeditions — You may spend 1 of my boosts. If you do, it gains 1 boost.
#I can't be played# unless you control a Feat.  {R} You may target another Character. It loses [[Fleeting]] and gains 1 boost.
{H} [Sabotage] a card with Reserve Cost {2} or less.
{H} You may return target Character facing me with Base Cost #{2} or less# to its owner's hand.  {R} I gain 2 boosts.
#I can't be played# unless a {D} ability was activated this turn.  #{J}# [Resupply].
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: #{D} : Pay {1} less for the next Character you play this turn, down to a minimum of {1}.#

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} I gain [[Asleep]].  #At Noon — [Resupply].#

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Pay {1} less for the next Character you play this turn, down to a minimum of {1}.

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: #I can't be played# unless there's an Animal in an opponent's Expedition.  #When I leave the Expedition zone — Create a [Woollyback 1/1/1] Animal token in my Expedition.#
{J} You may target another Character with {V} less than or equal to mine. It gains 1 boost.
{H} [Sabotage] a Character with {V} less than or equal to mine.
#{J}# [Resupply]. If you put an Animal in Reserve this way, it gains 1 boost.
{H} My Expedition [Ascends].  When I leave an [[Ascended]] Expedition — Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in it.
#{J}# My Expedition [Ascends].  When my Expedition moves forward [due to Ascension] — Draw a card.
When I leave the Expedition zone — My Expedition [Ascends].
#I can't be played# unless there's another Character in each of your Expeditions.  When I leave the Expedition zone — Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in each of your Expeditions.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: #{D} : Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in target Expedition.#

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: #{H} You may pay {1}. If you do, I activate my {D} ability.#
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Draw a card, then discard a card from your hand.

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} I gain [[Fleeting]] unless six or more cards are in your discard pile.  {H} [Sabotage].
#I can't be played# unless six or more cards are in your discard pile.  {H} Draw a card.
[[Fleeting]].  Discard a card from your hand. If you do, discard target card in play with Base Cost {3} or less.
